sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90994" key="prwtoku/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτο-κύων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κυνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n90994.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">first dog</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chief of the Cynics,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.154</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
